title: Eva Souls
wikitext:
[]: Eva Souls             Quote Post by Dr_Toxicophilous » Mon Sep 10, 2007 5:49 am I know Unit 00's soul is a big question. One idea I've never heard mentioned is Ritsuko's mother. She died close to the evas and you never actually see her body. Also Unit 00's tried to kill both Rei and Ikari. Also do the evas Asuka fights in EOE have souls? I'm thinking they don't since they don't even seem to use AT fields.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Sep 10, 2007 5:54 am Ach, I thought so. "Naoko in Unit-00" still remains like a plague. While it appears to be Naoko on the basis that the Eva attacked both Gendo and Rei, remember that Naoko hated Rei, and that an Eva is a sentient being. Trying to put Rei in an Eva with Naoko's soul inside wouldn't work, and it'd also be outright suicidal. Based on the visions Shinji sees in Episode 14, the soul inside Unit-00 is that of Rei herself, or a part thereof. Look through all the recently posted-in threads, one of them has a link to the Unit-00 soul discussion.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Sep 10, 2007 6:40 am UrsusArctos wrote: While it appears to be Naoko on the basis that the Eva attacked both Gendo and Rei, remember that Naoko hated Rei, and that an Eva is a sentient being. Trying to put Rei in an Eva with Naoko's soul inside wouldn't work, and it'd also be outright suicidal.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 10, 2007 1:11 pm The Rei inside of Unit-00 is Rei 1, or at least a part of her: http://evacommentary.org/FGP/The_Soul_in_Evangelion_Unit-00 With the MP Evas, they have Kaworu-Dummy Plugs. Not sure if they have souls or not though. I'd say no, but...

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Sep 10, 2007 1:52 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Not sure if they have souls or not though. I'd say no, but...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 10, 2007 1:55 pm Actually, I think she did, yeah. If that's the case, I guess the souls the MP Eva Series have would be that of Kaworu?? Just guessing, really.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Sep 10, 2007 2:06 pm So, who's in Unit02, then?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon Sep 10, 2007 2:08 pm CitizenGeek wrote: So, who's in Unit02, then?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Sep 10, 2007 2:23 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: If that's the case, I guess the souls the MP Eva Series have would be that of Kaworu??

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 10, 2007 2:45 pm CitizenGeek wrote: So, who's in Unit02, then?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 10, 2007 2:57 pm Smith wrote: My guess is that they're SEELE personnel who either died in the line of duty or volunteered for what they saw as a role benefiting all humanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Mon Sep 10, 2007 6:45 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Smith wrote: My guess is that they're SEELE personnel who either died in the line of duty or volunteered for what they saw as a role benefiting all humanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Sep 10, 2007 7:54 pm And kind of a "Duh!" question, but don't the souls in Evas have to be female, or not necessarily?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Sep 10, 2007 7:54 pm All the dead mothers whose souls had been kept pickled? Wonder what happened to them during 3I/ Instrumentality. We never learn whose souls are in Eva-03 to Eva-13 (Eva-03 may have been Toji's mom, but we never learn for sure)

[]:             Quote Post by Dr_Toxicophilous » Tue Sep 11, 2007 12:58 am Ach, I thought so. "Naoko in Unit-00" still remains like a plague.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 11, 2007 4:45 am I guess most people assume(Ignoring the Rei images), that the Eva tried to hit Gendo and Rei because they were the two people directly behind the window Eva-00 started punching. Ritsuko was inside the control room both times...and she did wonder if the Eva was trying to kill her even back in Episode 05.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Sep 11, 2007 8:49 am UrsusArctos wrote: I guess most people assume(Ignoring the Rei images), that the Eva tried to hit Gendo and Rei because they were the two people directly behind the window Eva-00 started punching. Ritsuko was inside the control room both times...and she did wonder if the Eva was trying to kill her even back in Episode 05.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Tue Sep 11, 2007 11:15 am Eva was pretty vauge on what exactly the "soul" is. It can't be the "soul" as we think of it, as it is an obviously mesurable and provable thing in EVA world. So bascially all we know is that every living human (and assumedly the Angels) have this "soul" and that EVA units will not work without one inside. Also, this soul can be divided or negated as NOT having a soul (or atleast not having a WHOLE soul) is not fatal. So did I miss something cause from where I stand I need a little more information on what a "soul" in the Eva universe is...

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Sep 11, 2007 11:19 am shinesman_cobalt wrote: I need a little more information on what a "soul" in the Eva universe is...

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Tue Sep 11, 2007 11:28 am EvaCub wrote: shinesman_cobalt wrote: I need a little more information on what a "soul" in the Eva universe is...

She died close to the evas and you never actually see her body. Also Unit 00's tried to kill both Rei and Ikari. Also do the evas Asuka fights in EOE have souls? I'm thinking they don't since they don't even seem to use AT fields.
